claim: No Stable, release, complete conformance, package-parity, or publication claim is made.

semantics.nativeBasis: A labelled text input owns a conditional listbox and submits one canonical hidden value.
semantics.rolePolicy: Combobox, listbox, option, invalid, required, disabled, read-only, busy, cancellable creation, and recovery state remain baseline; preview output is absent when disabled.

keyboard.behavior: Moves among enabled options and the available create action.
Commits the active option or explicit create action.

nonColor: Labels, check state, text, and structure accompany color.
responsive: Logical properties and a bounded overlay support narrow and RTL layouts.
consumerResponsibilities: Treat onCreate as a cancellable request; honor its AbortSignal and own persistence, conflict handling, and idempotency.
Localize messages and retest composed validation.
Do not claim Stable until all promotion evidence is current.
